description_long: This is a standard push broom with a long, straight wooden handle and a wide, rectangular broom head. The handle is a light beige color, likely made of wood, and is smoothly finished with a consistent cylindrical shape. The broom head is attached perpendicularly to the handle and features a dense row of dark bristles, which appear to be synthetic or natural fibers. The bristles are arranged in a straight, uniform line, providing a broad sweeping surface ideal for cleaning large flat areas such as sidewalks or garage floors. The connection between the handle and the broom head is reinforced, suggesting durability for repeated use. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, giving the broom a utilitarian and functional appearance.
description: A classic push broom with a long wooden handle and a wide, rectangular head densely packed with dark bristles. Designed for sweeping large surfaces, it has a simple, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the broom, with the wide rectangular broom head and dense bristles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the broom head and handle, with the bristles appearing as a narrow dark strip.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the full broom head and bristles, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the slim profile and the attachment of the handle to the broom head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical wooden handle with a round cross-section and smooth finish; no visible grip enhancements or end caps.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: Bristles are densely packed in a straight, uniform row across the rectangular broom head; all bristles appear to be of similar length and are dark in color.
attribute_mounting_position: Designed to be stored vertically by leaning against a wall; no visible mounting hole or hook.
